message:
test(stream): add comprehensive unit tests for chain and filter_map combinators

chain.rs: +8 tests (empty first/second/both, accessors, into_inner,
size_hint after exhaustion, large streams, nested chains)

filter.rs: +12 tests covering Filter (empty, all-accepted, stateful
predicate, accessors) and FilterMap (empty, all-None, alternating,
type change, size_hint, stateful closure, accessors)

Closes bd-u4q0, bd-vtmn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
